# VeloAI Tech Audit — 2026-03-15

*Generated by Nora · Pulled from main at c96d7fd*

---

## Project Overview

**VeloAI** — self-hosted cycling data platform. Strava ingestor → PostgreSQL → Grafana dashboards + CLI route planner.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Repo | `~/Developer/veloai` |
| Language | Python 3.11 (Docker) / 3.9+ (CLI) |
| Architecture | 3 Docker services + local CLI |
| Latest commit | `c96d7fd` — feat(grafana): Year in Review dashboard |

---

## What Changed in This Pull (26 files)

Major batch of bug fixes + new Grafana dashboard. Highlights:

**Bug fixes (from internal audit):**
- P0: Crashes on missing Strava fields (`start_date`, `distance`, `average_speed`) — all fixed
- P0: Komoot broken URLs removed from planner output
- P0: CLI `--start` arg crash on malformed input — fixed with validation
- P1: Elevation profile index mismatch (null skipping was unpairing data) — fixed
- P1: XSS via unescaped OSM/Strava waypoint names in HTML — fixed
- P1: MTB safety param silently ignored — fixed
- P1: `parse_time("13pm")` returning `"25:00"` — fixed
- P1: Asymmetric data-richness scoring in dedup merge — fixed
- Stdout/stderr separation for CLI diagnostic output — fixed across all modules

**New feature:**
- Grafana: Year in Review dashboard (hero stats, monthly volume, year-over-year comparison, consistency heatmap, monthly bests)

---

## Architecture

```
[Strava API] → veloai-ingestor (Python) → veloai-postgres (PostgreSQL 15, port 5423)
                                                    ↓
                                        veloai-grafana (port 3021)
                                        
[Local CLI] → veloai/ package → connects to server DB → Valhalla GPX + map preview
```

**Services:** All 3 run via `docker compose` on the server.

---

## Code Layout

| Path | Role |
|---|---|
| `ingestor/main.py` | Scheduler — polls Strava every 10 min |
| `ingestor/strava.py` | Strava API calls, activity parsing |
| `ingestor/db.py` | Schema DDL, upserts, dedup logic |
| `ingestor/fitness.py` | EMA-based CTL/ATL/TSB calculation |
| `veloai/cli.py` | CLI entry point |
| `veloai/planner.py` | Output formatter |
| `veloai/route_planner.py` | Route planning logic |
| `veloai/route_generator.py` | Valhalla GPX generation |
| `veloai/route_intelligence.py` | 10-source waypoint scoring |
| `veloai/weather.py` | Open-Meteo weather + ride time scoring |
| `veloai/db.py` | Read-only DB client (CLI) |
| `grafana/dashboards/` | 5 dashboard JSON files |

---

## CLI Interface

```bash
cd /Users/nora/Developer/veloai
.venv/bin/python3 -m veloai.cli plan \
  (--duration DURATION | --distance DISTANCE) \
  [--surface road|gravel|mtb] \
  [--loop | --no-loop] \
  [--waypoints "Place1,Place2"] \
  [--date DATE] \
  [--time TIME] \
  [--start lat,lng] \
  [--preference variety|comfort] \
  [--safety 0.0-1.0] \
  [--output DIR]
```

**No CLI changes in this pull** — interface is stable.

---

## Open Findings (from internal audit `docs/audit-2026-03-15-internal.md`)

### P1 — Significant, needs design decision

| ID | Issue | Status |
|---|---|---|
| O1 | Stream restoration in dedup merge wiped by subsequent `upsert_streams` — saved streams get lost | Open — needs API contract change |
| O2 | `find_duplicate_by_distance` defined but never called | Open — latent dead code |
| O3 | Refresh token rotation: if DB write fails, in-memory token not updated → next auth fails | Open — rare edge case |
| O4 | `bool` subclass of `int` means boolean configs can't be set to False via env vars | Open — latent |
| O5 | Sunrise/sunset timezone comparison bug — local ride time vs UTC | Open |

### P2 — Low priority

| ID | Issue |
|---|---|
| O8 | No startup retry if DB not ready on boot |
| O9 | `upsert_streams` DELETE+INSERT not atomic (autocommit=True) |
| O12 | Strava segments bounding box uses hardcoded `cos(lat)=0.75` |
| O16 | No `pyproject.toml` — CLI can't be pip-installed |
| O17 | Dependencies use floor pins only (`>=`) — no upper bounds |
| O18 | Dockerfile runs as root |

---

## Tests

71 tests defined. `pytest` not installed in venv — tests untested this audit.

**High-value untested functions:**
- `_haversine_km` — critical distance math
- `_decode_polyline6` — algorithmic, bug-prone
- `parse_distance`, `_analyze_wind` — input parsing + geometry
- `best_ride_hours` — pure scoring, no HTTP

| Dashboard | Status |
|---|---|
| Overview | ✅ — linked to Year in Review |
| Activity Detail | ✅ |
| Fitness Trends | ✅ |
| Weekly Report | ✅ |
| Training Log | ✅ |
| **Year in Review** | ✅ **New** — year selector, prev-year comparison, consistency heatmap |

---

## Recommendations

| Priority | Item | Action |
|---|---|---|
| 🔴 P1 | Stream restore bug (O1) | Design fix: signal caller not to overwrite streams after dedup merge |
| ⚠️ P2 | Install pytest in venv | `pip install pytest` — 71 tests should be runnable |
| ⚠️ P2 | Dockerfile runs as root | Add `USER` directive |
| ℹ️ Info | `find_duplicate_by_distance` never called | Document intent or remove |
| ✅ OK | All P0 crashes fixed | No crash paths in this pull |
| ✅ OK | CLI interface stable | No breaking changes |
| ✅ OK | XSS fixed | HTML escaping added to map preview |
